report.summary: Community growth cycle v3 (Mar 17): FOMC Day 1 complete — decision tomorrow 2pm ET; drafted 4 tweets + 6-post FOMC thread + Discord/Telegram update + full newsletter template; NEW narrative: Nvidia GTC sent AI crypto tokens surging (TAO +14%, FET +14%, NEAR/GRASS/WLD +10%); Bernstein called market bottom; 5 crypto card reviews published today (Bybit, Gemini, Nexo, Fold, BitPay); created AI crypto social card (social-ai-crypto-nvidia-gtc.svg); BTC $73,138, Fear & Greed 15, ETF inflows $1.3B March; Powell term expires May 23 — Warsh leading replacement candidate.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted

Tweet (Wed morning): Bernstein Bottom Call — Fear & Greed 15, negative perp funding, ETF inflows positive, BTC +8% March; last time all 4 aligned = BTC at $16K; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator

Twitter Thread (6 posts, Wed pre-2pm): FOMC Deep Dive — dot plot vs rate decision, Iran/tariffs/stagflation context, 7/8 bearish pattern, contrarian case, 3 scenarios with BTC targets, Powell's final meetings as Chair

Newsletter (Thu Mar 19): FOMC aftermath lead; 3 subject lines; Market pulse (BTC, Fear 15, ETF $1.3B); 4 new pages (FOMC guide, Telegram Bots, Virtuals, Crypto Cards); Worth reading (Tax guide 28 days to Apr 15, DeFAI guide); Degen Corner: Nvidia GTC + AI agent revenue thesis

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: FOMC DAY 1 COMPLETE: Fed meeting started today Mar 17. Rate decision Mar 18 at 2pm ET, Powell presser 2:30pm. 94% hold at 3.50-3.75%. Dot plot is the real mover — 0/1/2 cuts for 2026.
MARKET DATA (live search): BTC $73,138 (+2.2% 24h, +8% March). ETH $2,243 (+6.9%). SOL $92.89 (+5.6%). XRP $1.47 (+3.8%). Crypto market cap $2.45T (+1.32%). Fear & Greed 15 (Extreme Fear).

NEW NARRATIVE — NVIDIA GTC: Jensen Huang outlined next-gen AI infrastructure. AI crypto tokens surged: TAO +14%, FET +14%, NEAR/GRASS/WLD +10%+. Virtuals Protocol on Base has 17,700 agents and $39.5M cumulative revenue. DeFAI thesis playing out in real-time.

BERNSTEIN BOTTOM CALL: Analysts say 'Bitcoin and broader crypto markets have bottomed.' Confluence: Fear 15 + negative perp funding (longest since 2022) + ETF inflows positive + BTC first green month in 5. Last time = BTC $16K late 2022.
POWELL TRANSITION: Term expires May 23, 2026. Kevin Warsh is leading replacement candidate — viewed as more hawkish but open to financial innovation/deregulation.

MACRO CONTEXT: CPI 2.4% (pre-Iran). Brent crude $104-105/bbl. US-Israel Iran strikes sent oil briefly to $119. Trump 15% tariffs. Stagflation whispers. First SEP to incorporate Iran conflict + tariffs.
HISTORICAL PATTERN: BTC dropped after 7/8 FOMC meetings. Jan 2026: held as expected → BTC fell 7.3% ($90.4K→$83.4K) in 48h. But 48-hour rebound window is common entry point.
PAGES PUBLISHED TODAY: 5 crypto card reviews (Bybit, Gemini, Nexo, Fold, BitPay). 2 pages built (Telegram Trading Bots, Virtuals Protocol). Site at 385+ published slugs.
Posting schedule: Tue evening (FOMC snapshot + AI crypto tweet + Discord) → Wed morning (Bernstein + FOMC thread) → Wed post-2pm (reaction tweet + crypto cards) → Thu (newsletter)
